name: Path Traversal: '/../filedir'
description: The product does not properly neutralize '/../filedir' sequences in user-supplied pathnames, allowing attackers to traverse outside restricted directories by prepending a slash before the dot-dot sequence.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing '/../' sequences that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node performing path canonicalization, allowlist validation, or directory containment checks
